channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran cautions no "final conclusion" yet as Trump touts deal to end war
item.description: Iran said Friday it had not yet reached a final conclusion on a deal to end the war with the U.S. despite President Trump announcing an agreement would be reached.

item.title: Video captures massive explosions destroying multiple homes
item.description: The blasts in Clinton Township, Pennsylvania, destroyed at least two homes and injured three people, including an 84-year-old woman.

item.title: UFC security at White House to match Super Bowl levels, Secret Service says
item.description: Security will be strict as UFC fans gather in Washington, D.C., for Freedom 250 and related events, according to the top Secret Service official.

item.title: Europol warns children recruited as criminals on 'industrial scale'
item.description: Children are being recruited as criminals at an industrial scale, posing the single greatest threat to Europe and the rest of the world.
